description: AI safety company and creator of Claude AI. Major investors include Amazon ($4B+), Google ($2B+), Spark Capital, and others.

proxy_rationale.AMZN: Amazon invested $4B+ in Anthropic; Claude powers Amazon Bedrock — primary proxy
proxy_rationale.GOOGL: Google invested $2B+; Anthropic team originated from Google Brain/DeepMind lineage

notes: Anthropic is incorporated as a public benefit corporation (PBC). Conversion or dual-class structure likely before IPO. Amazon is anchor investor and distribution partner via AWS.
